note: Validation matrix for the KQL practice grader. See run-validation.cjs.

cases.kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624 and LogonType == 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624 and LogonType == 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| top 10 by TimeGenerated desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4625 and LogonType == 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName =~ "sshd-session"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated asc

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > datetime(2026-04-25)
| take 50

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime("2026-04-25")
| take 50

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > datetime(2026-04-25)
| take 30

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated < datetime(2026-04-25)
| take 50

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > "2026-04-25"
| take 50

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where not(Account endswith "$") and Account != ""
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| extend ExtraCol = 1
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "chrome.exe"
| distinct DeviceName

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where tolower(FileName) == "chrome.exe"
| distinct DeviceName

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "chrome.exe"
| distinct DeviceName
| take 2

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "firefox.exe"
| distinct DeviceName

DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "LogonSuccess"

DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType =~ "LogonSuccess"

DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName

DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "LogonFailed"

DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where EventID == 4624

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h) and EventID == 4625
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625 and TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h) and EventID == 4625
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h) and EventID == 4624
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| top 5 by Events desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| order by Events desc
| take 5

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| top 2 by Events desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| top 1 by Events desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ProcessCommandLine contains "shell"

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex "shell"

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ProcessCommandLine contains "nonexistenttokenxyz"

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ProcessCommandLine !contains "shell"

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where ProcessCommandLine has "shell"

DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and RemoteIPType == "Public"
| distinct RemoteIP
| order by RemoteIP asc

DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and RemoteIPType == "Public"
| project RemoteIP
| distinct RemoteIP
| order by RemoteIP asc

DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and RemoteIPType == "Public"
| distinct RemoteIP
| order by RemoteIP asc
| take 1

DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and RemoteIPType == "Private"
| distinct RemoteIP
| order by RemoteIP asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 3
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where not(Account endswith "$") and Account != ""
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 3
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 100
| order by Failures desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 3
| order by Failures desc

let SuspiciousTools = dynamic(["mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (SuspiciousTools)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound")
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let SuspiciousTools = dynamic(["mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (SuspiciousTools)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let SuspiciousTools = dynamic(["mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where DeviceName has_any (SuspiciousTools)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName

DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by DeviceName

DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
| extend ExtraCol = 1

DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Type

union
    (SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4624
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source = "SecEvent"),
    (DeviceLogonEvents
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DeviceName, Account = AccountName,
                  IpAddress = RemoteIP, Source = "DefenderEDR")
| order by TimeGenerated desc

union
    (SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4624
        | extend Source = "SecEvent"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source),
    (DeviceLogonEvents
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
        | extend Source = "DefenderEDR"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DeviceName, Account = AccountName,
                  IpAddress = RemoteIP, Source)
| order by TimeGenerated desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4624
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source = "SecEvent"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

union
    (SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4625
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source = "SecEvent"),
    (DeviceLogonEvents
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonFailed"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DeviceName, Account = AccountName,
                  IpAddress = RemoteIP, Source = "DefenderEDR")
| order by TimeGenerated desc

union
    (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4624),
    (DeviceLogonEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess")
| project TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User " from " SourceIP " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Accepted password"
| parse SyslogMessage with "Accepted password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, SourceIP, Port

let Window = 5m;
let Fails = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let Wins = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
Fails
| join kind=inner Wins on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where WinTime > FailTime and WinTime - FailTime <= Window
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 3
| order by Success desc

let W = 5m;
let F = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let S = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
F
| join kind=inner S on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where WinTime > FailTime and WinTime - FailTime <= W
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 3
| order by Success desc

let Window = 5m;
let Fails = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let Wins = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
Fails
| join kind=inner Wins on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where WinTime > FailTime and WinTime - FailTime <= Window
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 100
| order by Success desc

let Window = 5m;
let Fails = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let Wins = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
Fails
| join kind=inner Wins on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailTime > WinTime and FailTime - WinTime <= Window
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 3
| order by Success desc

let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftouter (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses

let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftouter (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftouter (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses
| extend ExtraCol = 1

let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftanti (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses

let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses

let EncodedPS = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "EncodedCommand"
    | summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName;
let Outbound = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize NetCount = count() by DeviceName;
EncodedPS
| join kind=inner (Outbound) on DeviceName
| project DeviceName, PsCount, NetCount

let A = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "EncodedCommand"
    | summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName;
let B = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize NetCount = count() by DeviceName;
A
| join kind=inner (B) on DeviceName
| project DeviceName, PsCount, NetCount

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has "EncodedCommand"
| summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName
| extend NetCount = 0

let EncodedPS = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where FileName has "EncodedCommand"
    | summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName;
let Outbound = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize NetCount = count() by DeviceName;
EncodedPS
| join kind=inner (Outbound) on DeviceName
| project DeviceName, PsCount, NetCount

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Band = case(
    SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"),                "low",
    SeverityLevel == "warning",                          "medium",
    SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "high",
    "unknown")
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| order by Computer asc, Band asc

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Band = iff(SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"), "low",
                  iff(SeverityLevel == "warning", "medium",
                  iff(SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "high", "unknown")))
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| order by Computer asc, Band asc

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Band = case(
    SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"),                "low",
    SeverityLevel == "warning",                          "medium",
    SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "high",
    "unknown")
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| extend ExtraCol = 1
| order by Computer asc, Band asc

Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Band = case(
    SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"),                "high",
    SeverityLevel == "warning",                          "medium",
    SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "low",
    "unknown")
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| order by Computer asc, Band asc

SecurityEvent

SecurityEvent

SecurityEvent

SecurityEvent

| where tolower(Account) == "corp\\bryce"

let Baseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Hist = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=leftanti (Hist) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Baseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| extend ExtraCol = 1
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Baseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=leftsemi (Baseline) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| extend Tokens = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Tokens
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| extend Toks = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Toks
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| extend Tokens = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Tokens
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{200,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "cmd.exe"
| extend Tokens = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Tokens
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds
| where tostring(AlertId) == "alert-002"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where AlertIds has "alert-002"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds
| where tostring(AlertId) == "alert-zzzz"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| mv-expand AlertId = Title
| where tostring(AlertId) == "alert-002"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, TimeGenerated = bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc

| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by DeviceName

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account),
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 3
| order by DistinctAccounts desc

SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625 and TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where isnotempty(Account) and Account !endswith "$"
| summarize
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10),
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 3
| order by DistinctAccounts desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account),
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 1
| order by DistinctAccounts desc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| summarize
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account),
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 1
| order by DistinctAccounts desc

let Baseline = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Hist = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| join kind=leftanti (Hist) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Baseline = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| extend ExtraCol = 1
| order by TimeGenerated desc

let Baseline = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "FileDeleted"
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend M = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse M with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Accepted password"
| parse SyslogMessage with "Accepted password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP, Port

Syslog
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| parse SyslogMessage with "Failed password for " User " from " SourceIP " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP, Port
